metadata.title: Training Auto-Resume + HPO Grid Implementation
metadata.next-plan: NONE — this is the last child plan

child-plan.critical-rules: - Scripts MUST use "docker compose run", NEVER "uv run python" for training. - Auto-resume must preserve MLflow fingerprint stability. - HPO grid reads from YAML — no hardcoded combinations in bash. - CLAUDE.md Rule #17: Never suggest standalone scripts as a run path. - CLAUDE.md Rule #18: Explicit Docker volume mounts for ALL artifacts.

phase.name: Fix auto-resume bug
phase.description: scripts/run_training_flow.py line 112 has `result.fold_count` but the TrainingFlowResult dataclass field is `n_folds`. This crashes at runtime.

task.name: Write regression test
task.tests: - test_training_flow_result_has_n_folds: TrainingFlowResult has n_folds attribute - test_training_flow_result_no_fold_count: TrainingFlowResult does NOT have fold_count - test_run_training_flow_script_references_n_folds: AST scan of run_training_flow.py does NOT contain "fold_count" (use ast.parse, NOT regex — CLAUDE.md Rule #16) - test_resume_fingerprint_deterministic: Same config → same fingerprint - test_resume_fingerprint_changes_with_loss: Different loss → different fingerprint

task.name: Fix the bug
task.acceptance: Test passes. Script no longer crashes on result access.

task.name: Write integration test with mock MLflow
task.tests: - test_find_completed_config_returns_none_when_no_match: Mock MLflow search_runs returning empty → find_completed_config returns None - test_find_completed_config_returns_run_id_when_match: Mock MLflow search_runs returning a run → find_completed_config returns run_id - test_compute_config_fingerprint_stable: Same inputs → same fingerprint across calls - test_load_fold_result_from_mlflow: Mock MLflow get_run → load_fold_result returns correct metrics
task.guidance: Use unittest.mock.patch to mock mlflow.search_runs and mlflow.get_run. Import from minivess.pipeline.resume_discovery. Do NOT require a running MLflow server.

phase.name: Experiment YAML configs
phase.description: Create experiment configs that define hyperparameter grids. These are read by train_all_hyperparam_combos.sh.

task.name: Create DynUNet grid config
task.content-guidance: experiment_name: dynunet_grid model_family: dynunet hyperparameters: loss_name: [cbdice_cldice, dice_ce, dice_ce_cldice] learning_rate: [1e-3, 3e-4] batch_size: [1, 2] fixed: max_epochs: 100 num_folds: 3 compute: auto mlflow_experiment: minivess_hpo_grid

task.name: Create minimal smoke test config
task.content-guidance: experiment_name: smoke_test model_family: dynunet hyperparameters: loss_name: [dice_ce] fixed: max_epochs: 1 num_folds: 1 batch_size: 1 compute: auto mlflow_experiment: minivess_smoke_test

phase.name: HPO grid script
phase.description: Replace the placeholder train_all_hyperparam_combos.sh with a real implementation that reads YAML configs and launches Docker-based training.

task.name: Write grid script tests
task.tests: - test_grid_script_exists: scripts/train_all_hyperparam_combos.sh exists - test_grid_script_uses_docker: Contains "docker compose" (AST/grep of shell) - test_grid_script_no_bare_python: Does NOT contain "uv run python" for training - test_grid_script_reads_yaml: Contains reference to configs/experiments/ - test_grid_script_has_dry_run: Contains "--dry-run" flag handling - test_experiment_configs_exist: configs/experiments/*.yaml files exist - test_experiment_config_valid_yaml: Each config is valid YAML with required keys

task.name: Implement train_all_hyperparam_combos.sh
task.description:
Replace placeholder with real implementation: 1. Parse CLI args (--config, --dry-run, --families, --losses) 2. Read YAML config with yq or python -c "import yaml; ..." 3. Generate Cartesian product of hyperparameters 4. For each combination: - Check MLflow for existing completed run (auto-resume via fingerprint) - If not found, launch: docker compose -f deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml run --rm train python -m minivess.orchestration.flows.train_flow ... 5. --dry-run prints the grid without launching training
MUST use Docker. NEVER use bare "uv run python" for training. The script is a grid LAUNCHER — actual HPO (Bayesian search) uses hpo_flow.py.

task.name: Fix run_hpo.py placeholder
task.description:
The objective function currently returns 0.0 (placeholder). Replace with: invoke hpo_flow via Prefect deployment.
Pattern: def objective(trial): params = engine.suggest_params(trial, search_space.params) # Launch via Docker + Prefect result = subprocess.run([ "docker", "compose", "-f", "deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml", "run", "--rm", "train", ... ]) # Parse MLflow for result metric return best_val_loss
OR: Document that run_hpo.py is a LOCAL convenience wrapper and the proper path is: prefect deployment run 'hpo-flow/default'
task.acceptance: Script either invokes Docker or clearly documents that the proper execution path is via Prefect hpo_flow deployment.

task.name: Commit, push, PR, close issues
task.steps: 1. Run: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/test_auto_resume.py tests/v2/unit/test_auto_resume_integration.py tests/v2/unit/test_hpo_grid_script.py -v 2. Run: uv run ruff check scripts/ src/ and uv run mypy src/ 3. git add and git commit (pre-commit hooks must pass) 4. git push -u origin feat/training-resume-hpo 5. gh pr create --title "feat: auto-resume + HPO grid — training workflow (#365, #401)" 6. gh issue close 365 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN. Auto-resume via config fingerprinting." 7. gh issue close 401 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN. Grid script reads YAML, launches via Docker."

child-plan.completion-signal:
This is the LAST child plan. All 7 issues should now be closed: #304, #343, #365, #401, #424, #469, #474
Master plan: docs/planning/overnight-master-plan.xml
